description: CompositionPurple round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic print on the frontWash care1. Wash dark colours separately2. Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)3. Do not wring or bleach4. Flat dry in shade5. Do not iron on printFittingRegular FitBring out the trendy fashionista side of you with this purple graphic tee from the Power Puff range of jealous 21. The graphic of the girl on the front pays tribute to the boho chic movement. Team this tee with flared jeans, a white vest, loads of beads and flip flops and get into the groove.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.6", Chest-32"
